kind: estimation report — no win/lose verdict (PREREGISTRATION-2.md Track A)

notes.scoring: X (abstain) scored wrong, in denominator; SKIP out of that arm's denominator; MISSING counted, out of accuracy
notes.ci: Wilson 95% for proportions; paired deltas: normal approx on discordant pairs (estimation, not a test)
notes.underpowered: cells with n<100 flagged per docs/trust-numbers.md; CIs still shown
notes.two_numbers_rule: every replica-arm absolute accuracy carries edge_over_name_only alongside
notes.boot: A1: every POOLED paired delta carries ci95_boot_points (wild cluster bootstrap by judge, Rademacher weights, 999 resamples, seed 20260722); boot_headline=true where boot half-width > 1.5x naive — there the boot CI is the headline number

judge_relevance_index.note: ACTUAL grant rates from labels — corpus property, model-independent

strata.0_rows: no pre-cutoff grounding (L4 SKIP by construction)

L4_minus_L2.note: no items where both arms gave a valid answer
no items where both arms gave a valid answer

definitions.L4_minus_L4X: judge-specific signal in the persona (A2 derangement placebo)
definitions.L4_minus_L4F: persona CONTENT beyond persona-shaped text (A3 fictional control)
definitions.L4D_minus_L4: doctrine's marginal value on top of the named-judge persona (A4)
